title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Man Infraconstruction

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Man Infraconstruction
jsonLd.description:
Man Infraconstruction, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Man Infraconstruction:
Man Infraconstruction is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Man Infraconstruction!
